programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Sports personalities share their perspectives and discuss various subjects like the ever-evolving world of business, diversity in elite competitions and the rise of esports.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Originals" offers bold takes for curious minds on today's biggest topics; hosted by experts covering stories you haven't seen and viewpoints you haven't heard, you'll discover cinematic, data-led shows that investigate the intersection of business and culture; exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, "Bloomberg Originals" is business as you've never seen it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.desc: (S11E22) Raj Subramaniam, FedEx President and CEO.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Originals" offers bold takes for curious minds on today's biggest topics; hosted by experts covering stories you haven't seen and viewpoints you haven't heard, you'll discover cinematic, data-led shows that investigate the intersection of business and culture; exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, "Bloomberg Originals" is business as you've never seen it.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.desc: Financier and philanthropist David Rubenstein talks with his peers - leaders of some of America's biggest companies - in this interview show that aims to answer the question of what makes a great leader; Rubenstein uses his chats to explore successful leadership skills through the personal and professional choices made by the business world's most influential people; Rubenstein travels across the country to find out about the business leaders' stories and uncover information about their paths to success; the interview subjects include Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates, Berkshire Hathaway chairman Warren Buffett and Pepsi CEO Indra Nooyi.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Sports personalities share their perspectives and discuss various subjects like the ever-evolving world of business, diversity in elite competitions and the rise of esports.

programme.title: The Fine Art Auction
programme.desc: Acquire authentic fine art works, all at a fraction of gallery prices! Featuring the works of classic and contemporary artists, join our fun, entertaining auctions everySaturdayfrom 9.00 pm ET.

programme.title: Leaders with Lacqua
programme.desc: What drives the world's most influential minds?; in Leaders with Francine Lacqua, Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas; discover what inspires them, how they navigate power and the lessons they offer on defining success. Insightful, cinematic and elegantly crafted, "Leaders" goes beyond the headlines to reveal the human side of leadership.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Originals" offers bold takes for curious minds on today's biggest topics; hosted by experts covering stories you haven't seen and viewpoints you haven't heard, you'll discover cinematic, data-led shows that investigate the intersection of business and culture; exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, "Bloomberg Originals" is business as you've never seen it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets, from tech, to geopolitics, and the world's energy transition.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy; from politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Markets: Asia
programme.desc: In an effort to provide extensive coverage of worldwide financial markets, Bloomberg features several regional shows under the "Bloomberg Markets" banner, with each focusing on that geographic area's markets. This Asian-focused version is hosted by Shery Ahn, David Ingles, Haidi Lun, Rishaad Salamat and Angie Lau. They report the latest business news and speak with the likes of political and business leaders to help investors make investment decisions that build their portfolios.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa; linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping the decisions of traders across the Middle East, Africa and beyond.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: Live: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: "The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics; based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern have the economy and global markets "under surveillance"; their daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond cover the latest in business, investment, and geopolitics; no other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg ETF IQ
programme.desc: Bloomberg ETF IQ focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry; Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas are joined by leaders in this market.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Balance of Power" with host David Westin is a daily look at how politics is impacting global business decisions; top lawmakers, business executives and government leaders join to discuss doing business in today's volatile political climate.

programme.title: Live: Bloomberg Businessweek
programme.desc: Carol Massar, David Gura. programme.title: Arts Unveiled

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: Reporter
programme.desc: Con la cámara siempre a mano, el equipo de reporteros del programa informa sobre los cambios que se producen en Alemania, Europa y el resto del mundo, ya sean de alcance internacional o sobre peculiaridades de la vida diaria.

programme.title: Afrimaxx
programme.desc: Inspiration and innovation in all areas of popular culture, from fashion and design to architecture, art, food, and travel. The focus is on outstanding people who are doing extraordinary things on the African continent.

programme.title: Shift
programme.desc: Can I use blockchain technology? Will artificial intelligence take over my career? What exactly is "Machine Learning"? programme.desc: Magazine diario presentado por Karen Webb que informa, a través de documentales, reportajes y entrevistas, sobre el estilo de vida de los habitantes de las distintas ciudades de Europa, durante los 365 días del año.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: DW News Focus
programme.desc: Our deep dive format explains the stories that matter - with clarity, context and journalistic rigor. Each segment goes beyond the headlines to uncover what's driving key developments around the world, featuring sharp analysis, expert voices and exclusive on the ground insights from where events are unfolding.

programme.title: Global Us
programme.desc: There are eight billion people on Earth and we are better connected than ever.

programme.title: Reporter
programme.desc: Con la cámara siempre a mano, el equipo de reporteros del programa informa sobre los cambios que se producen en Alemania, Europa y el resto del mundo, ya sean de alcance internacional o sobre peculiaridades de la vida diaria.

programme.title: Shift
programme.desc: Can I use blockchain technology? Will artificial intelligence take over my career? What exactly is "Machine Learning"? These are some of the questions "SHIFT - Living in the Digital Age" tries to answer. The program focuses on a single topic - in depth and in detail. We talk to experts, present the key facts and explain complicated subjects in a simple manner. SHIFT - substantial, never superficial.

programme.title: Eco Africa
programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. In Africa especially, huge numbers of animal and wildlife species have dramatically fallen, largely due to a vast increase in human population across the continent. The increasing population is taking over vast swathes of natural land and in turn, adding to the demand for natural resources. This series explores the different concepts being used to help sustain our future, such as alternative resources, biodiversity conservation and the future of travel.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: In this week's show, we explore the complex issue of tribalism. We travel to Kenya to meet a couple whose love defies societal norms. programme.title: REV
programme.desc: New thinking and technology are revolutionizing our cars, our cities, our way of life. Rev doesn't just want to know how fast we get from A to B, but how we get there as well. Take a spin through new possibilities every week with REV.

programme.title: DW News

programme.title: Eco Africa
programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. In Africa especially, huge numbers of animal and wildlife species have dramatically fallen, largely due to a vast increase in human population across the continent. The increasing population is taking over vast swathes of natural land and in turn, adding to the demand for natural resources. This series explores the different concepts being used to help sustain our future, such as alternative resources, biodiversity conservation and the future of travel.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: 77 per cent of Africa's population are below the age of thirty-five yet their interests are under-represented poltically and economically. This show aims to redress the balance by providing a voice to the largest demographic group on the continent. These dynamic younger people are politically engaged and will determine the future path their countries, and the continent as a whole, will follow in the twenty-first century. Presented by Eddy Micah Jr. from Ghana and Wanjiku Mwaura from Kenya, the show promotes a pan-African agenda by encouraging dialogue between the various interested parties. The show pulls no punches when delivering its compelling reports, personal accounts and provocative discussions. A long overdue look at the big issues that affect the youth of Africa.

programme.title: America's Journey to Freedom

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: 77 per cent of Africa's population are below the age of thirty-five yet their interests are under-represented poltically and economically. This show aims to redress the balance by providing a voice to the largest demographic group on the continent. These dynamic younger people are politically engaged and will determine the future path their countries, and the continent as a whole, will follow in the twenty-first century. Presented by Eddy Micah Jr. from Ghana and Wanjiku Mwaura from Kenya, the show promotes a pan-African agenda by encouraging dialogue between the various interested parties. The show pulls no punches when delivering its compelling reports, personal accounts and provocative discussions. A long overdue look at the big issues that affect the youth of Africa.

programme.title: Sports Life
programme.desc: Donjeta Sadiku is a supremely talented boxer with multiple titles to her name. But there is a problem: Donjeta comes from Kosovo, a state whose sovereignty many other countries refuse to recognize. programme.title: Saved
programme.desc: Over four episodes `Saved' retells the stories of everyday heroes. The inspiring events discussed involve courageous people who have risked their own lives to save others in times of peril. Drama reconstructions portray the incidents as they happened, with commentary and interviews with those saved and their saviours. Caught between life and death, these strangers had seconds to act as they bravely put their lives on the line and made a crucial difference. The first episode relives a moment, thousands of feet up in the air, as a group of six parachutists prepare for a routine jump. When one of the parachutists gets tangled in a chord his jump goes tragically wrong, leaving him dangerously hanging from the aircraft.

This series is not about anyone in particular, but rather what we as hunters enjoy the most.

programme.desc: Travel along with the Savage Outdoors crew as they travel North America on some of the most intense big game hunting adventures ever caught on film!

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Hiking and hunting in Nepal.

programme.title: Rooster Tales
programme.desc: Rooster Tales takes viewers on exciting upland bird hunting adventures across North America in search of wild birds in wild places. Host Travis Frank shares stories from the field about passionate bird hunters, bird dogs, habitat conservation, and DIY bird hunts on public land.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: DUTV Co-Host Fred Zink joins Kevin VanDam and his boys on the banks of the Neosho River in Kansas in the heart of the Central Flyway for a waterfowl experience that rekindles the values and the good that comes from spending time outdoors.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Pete Roberts is the visionary behind Origin USA, a company uncompromising in its promise to produce 100% American made products; to keep his promise, Pete must challenge the idea that manufacturing must be done overseas.

programme.title: Whitetail Fix
programme.desc: A team of God-loving individuals, from different walks of life, different backgrounds and different jobs that all share one common bond: The passion and desire to achieve their Whitetail Fix!

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: It's the bear opener in Minnesota and Buddy Toepfer has waited five years for the chance to shoot a big one; Buddy's got a buddy who just happens to have a bear or two on his property.

programme.title: WildFed
programme.desc: Daniel heads out on a South Carolina gator hunt, then learns about an ancient American caffeine crop called Yaupon being rediscovered in Georgia.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Let's Fish TV is a weekly look at fishing in the Southern U.S. The program features both fresh and saltwater fishing for most southern species, and gives tips on where and how to catch the most popular game fish in the region.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy is back on the water, fishing off the coast of South Carolina for the number one seafood in America.

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Sparky, AKA THE JOKER from Jokers Wild Outdoors, takes friends, family and clients hunting all over the world and on M2D CAMO Properties for wild, exciting adventures.

programme.title: Dirt Trax TV
programme.desc: The guys head to Hatfield McCoy for a little buisness retreat while also riding big coal river and braveheart trail systems.

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: NASCAR O Reilly Auto Parts Series driver Jeb Burton and his father, NASCAR legend Ward Burton, take viewers beyond the checkered flag in Crossroads with the Burtons, where the excitement of racing meets a lifelong passion for hunting, conservation and the great outdoors.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the gray light, these moments are what make up the beauty of the wild. This series is not about anyone in particular, but rather what we as hunters enjoy the most.

programme.title: Chasing the 29
programme.desc: Follow Chase Anthony as he travels across North America pursuing one of the continent's greatest hunting challenges - the North American 29. From remote mountains to unforgiving backcountry, every hunt pushes physical limits, patience and determination. Along the way, the series captures the adventure, wildlife, landscapes, and stories that come with a life dedicated to the outdoors.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting

programme.title: Gun Stories

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: Our editors discuss the Springfield Armory Echelon Alpha.

Family.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.desc: When a mysterious man helps Earp with injured stagecoach passengers, Earp takes him to Dodge City, introduces him to Dr. McCarty and talks him into opening a medical practice; a smallpox outbreak leads to a disturbing suspicion about the new doctor.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A newspaper editor facing backlash for baseless accusations toward dance hall owner Sally Bascom kills her and frames Earp for the murder; Earp plays along to lure the editor into a trap while Doc Holliday and Gibbs take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: Though it has "weekend" in the title, this show discusses the week ahead in addition to offering suggestions for what to do on Saturday and Sunday. Weather Channel meteorologists go beyond the elements outside and into the realm of lifestyle tips. Each host has a recurring segment on "Weekend Recharge," which includes helping parents get a fresh start to each day and explaining how the weather is expected to impact the weekend's scheduled sports action.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral
programme.desc: From a massive haboob that turns day into night, to a freak hail storm that turns an Arizona pool into a torrent of waves, the most extreme weather, caught on camera.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral
programme.desc: Falling deep into a crevasse, swept away from a flash flood, and violently pick-up by a tornado; find out how these people escaped nature's clutches.

programme.title: Could You Survive? With Creek Stewart
programme.desc: An ATV accident pins an experienced outdoorsman in the Canadian badlands, helpless and immobile as freezing temperatures and coyotes close in; a young woman out for a quick walk in Yosemite National Park takes a bad fall.

programme.title: Could You Survive? With Creek Stewart
programme.desc: An adventurous young couple are pushed past their limits in a menacing Wyoming ice cave, with nothing but each other to protect them from freezing to death.

programme.title: Could You Survive? With Creek Stewart
programme.desc: A marriage proposal on a Montana mountaintop turns into a life-or-death struggle against wind, rain and cold; a concussion leaves an experienced hiker lost and confused in the Washington wilderness.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: When a violent windstorm flips a tractor-trailer on an exposed bridge, Kevin works under the most difficult and dangerous conditions of his career; James takes on a wind-battered wreck of his own.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: A tragic collision between two semis sends Bear and the crew from Ross into the fray; Nate and Andrew improvise after a load of lumber rolls on the 401, backing up traffic all the way to Quebec.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: Sonny hunts for a shortcut across town after a runaway van smashes through a wall and into the path of a full-speed truck; the crew from Herb's hurries to save a load of pharmaceuticals before it freezes.

programme.title: Backroad Truckers
programme.desc: Big Donny's senior drivers battle each other in the far north, while his most junior races to a hydro plant that can't restore power without her; when a competitor ups his game, Donny discovers his hotshotting empire is under attack.

programme.title: Backroad Truckers
programme.desc: Big Donny dispatches his entire crew to a challenging roadside crash recovery, but things go sideways when Craig is missing-in-action on the job. Angela struggles when she's sidelined after her truck breaks down on a hotshot mission.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods
programme.desc: Josh has an emotional breakdown while Dane builds one of the best shelters Creek has seen in his 15 years of survival instruction.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods
programme.desc: An emergency hits the woods when Johnny is rushed out on the woods to the hospital; Nick and Andrew are an odd couple.

programme.title: Prospectors
programme.desc: Brian Busse saves the day on Mount Antero; Dwayne's dreams are finally coming true; the Dorris family finds rare specimens; Amanda's dig site is vandalized, and the mountain threatens her with a Tommyknocker.

programme.title: Prospectors

programme.title: Leader's Playbook

In this candid interview with YouTube's CEO Neal Mohan, CNBC's Julia Boorstin explores the CEO's leadership playbook to reveal the strategies he uses to help drive two billion people a day to search, watch and create on the platform. This insightful conversation covers it all from Mohan's $14-billion bet on the NFL to the core strategy that compels him to meet, connect and listen to creators.

programme.title: Station West
programme.desc: In 1881, former Army Lt. John Haven (Dick Powell) acts as a secret government agent on a covert mission to investigate the theft of numerous gold shipments. Haven confides his mission to Capt. George Ilse (Tom Powers), who is doubtful over the shifty Haven's intent. Haven agrees to report his results to reliable gold mine owner Mary Caslon (Agnes Moorehead), then searches for the town's financier, Charlie (Jane Greer), whose nefarious dealings immediately bring her under suspicion.

programme.title: Seven Angry Men
programme.desc: Abolitionist John Brown's (Raymond Massey) fight against slavery ends with his 1859 arsenal raid at Harpers Ferry.

programme.title: Good Day for a Hanging
programme.desc: When the local sheriff is killed after a bank robbery, ex-lawman Ben Cutler (Fred MacMurray) collars the apparent killer, Eddie Campbell (Robert Vaughn). Because of his background as a local youth who spent time living with the Cutlers, Eddie gets the benefit of the doubt from Ben's daughter and his wife-to-be, Ruth (Margaret Hayes). Ben is firm in his belief that Eddie is guilty, and as the matter is debated in a divisive court battle, it will soon become clear whether he's right.

programme.title: The Desert Horseman
programme.desc: The Durango Kid (Charles Starrett) and his sidekick (Smiley Burnette) catch up to payroll robbers.

programme.title: The Desperadoes
programme.desc: Sheriff Steve Upton (Randolph Scott) is a devoted lawman who works tirelessly to keep order in his small town, nestled within the Utah territory. So, when Cheyenne Rogers (Glenn Ford), an old friend with a criminal past, rolls into town, Upton is immediately on edge. Cheyenne assures his pal that all that's behind him now. But when the town bank is robbed, Cheyenne becomes the locals' number one suspect. He'll have to prove his innocence to save himself and his friend's reputation.

programme.title: The Wings of Eagles
programme.desc: Frank Spig Wead (John Wayne) is a pilot trying to improve the Navy's aviation program. His military posts often require him to move his wife (Maureen O'Hara) and children. On the night he decides to spend more time with his family, Spig falls down the stairs and breaks his back. During his recovery, buddy Jughead Carson (Dan Dailey) convinces Spig to start writing pro-military films. Although he is successful, the Pearl Harbor bombing moves Spig to rejoin the Navy despite his paralysis.

programme.title: This Land Is Mine
programme.desc: In a Nazi-occupied European nation, Albert Lory (Charles Laughton) is a meek schoolmaster who is dominated by both his students and his elderly mother, Emma (Una O'Connor). Though Albert is initially wary of efforts to oppose the invading soldiers, he changes his tune after he's falsely accused of murder. He begins to make rousing speeches against the Nazis and their collaborators, prompting Maj. Erich von Keller (Walter Slezak) to offer Albert a pardon if he aids the Nazi cause.

programme.title: Fort Apache
programme.desc: When arrogant and stubborn Civil War hero Lieutenant Colonel Owen Thursday (Henry Fonda) arrives in Arizona with his daughter, Philadelphia (Shirley Temple), to assume command of the Fort Apache outpost, he clashes with level-headed Captain Kirby York (John Wayne). Viewing the local Native Americans through an ignorantly negative lens, Thursday is determined to engage them in battle for his own glory, despite the warnings of York -- an act of folly that will have dire consequences.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp struggles to uphold the law while keeping the peace when a strict ban on cattle rustling forces him to arrest rancher Rep Cantwell, triggering a battle between Dodge's most powerful ranchers.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A disgraced Englishman living in Henry Dart's establishment instigates a gunfight with a man he claims to owe money to, but Earp intervenes before anyone gets hurt and resolves to get to the root of the problem.

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes is in the Highlands; Mycroft is called to recover the Mazarin stone.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: South of Monterey
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid (Gilbert Roland), Pancho (Martin Garralaga) and a dancer try to outfox a swindler.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When Lazy Q cowboy Miles Breck learns about Ned Buntline's new book naming Earp the "King of the Frontier," he sets up a cowboy contest and bets $10,000 against Earp surviving a shootout.

programme.desc: The captain (David Janssen) and co-pilot of a disabled jetliner have an armed killer on board.

programme.title: Stolen Face
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon (Paul Henreid) makes a convict look like the pianist (Lizabeth Scott) he loves, then marries her.

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes investigates the disappearance of Mary Cushing's sister.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Ranch hand Mitch Hallam becomes Earp's newest deputy, seeking to prove his worth and earn the hand of his boss' daughter; he puts his job and his life on the line when he reveals an underhanded scheme being perpetrated by the other workers.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: Mayday at 40,000 Feet!
programme.desc: The captain (David Janssen) and co-pilot of a disabled jetliner have an armed killer on board.

programme.title: The Scarlet Coat
programme.desc: A Colonial major (Cornel Wilde) turns traitor to catch a British spy (Michael Wilding) plotting with Benedict Arnold.

programme.title: Beauty and the Bandit
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid (Gilbert Roland) and Chico (Martin Garralaga) secure the deed to a woman's ranch.

programme.title: Cattle Queen of Montana
programme.desc: An Army agent (Ronald Reagan) rides with a Texan (Barbara Stanwyck) trying to drive her father's cattle through rough territory.

programme.title: The Hard Man
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger (Guy Madison) turns deputy sheriff; a woman (Valerie French) wants him to kill her cattle-baron husband (Lorne Greene).

programme.title: Gunfighters
programme.desc: In Texas, gunfighter Brazos Kane (Randolph Scott) decides to lay down his guns for good and rides out to visit his best friend -- only to witness his murder. When Brazos takes the body to the nearby ranch of the powerful Banner (Griff Barnett), the rancher accuses him of the murder. Brazos leaves Banner's daughter, Bess (Barbara Britton), a vital piece of evidence in the crime, and then must evade Banner and a crooked sheriff as he reluctantly takes up arms to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Dallas
programme.desc: Soon after the end of the Civil War, Blayde Hollister, a former Confederate officer, is a fugitive from the law. He fakes his own death in order to avoid arrest and to lull his enemies into a false sense of security. It turns out Hollister is gunning for the brothers who murdered his family during the war. Joining up with the newly arrived Marshal Martin Weatherby, Hollister heads for Dallas, where his targets are terrorizing the population with a crime spree.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: When a UFO lands in Washington, D.C., bearing a message for Earth's leaders, all of humanity stands still. Klaatu has come on behalf of alien life who have been watching Cold War-era nuclear proliferation on Earth. But it is Klaatu's soft-spoken robot Gort that presents a more immediate threat to onlookers. A single mother and her son teach the world about peace and tolerance in this moral fable, ousting the tanks and soldiers that greet the alien's arrival.

programme.title: Conquest of Space
programme.desc: A captain (Walter Brooke), his son (Eric Fleming), a sergeant (Mickey Shaughnessy) and crew take off from a space station in a rocket ship for Mars.

programme.title: King of the Bandits
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid and Pancho track an outlaw responsible for a series of stagecoach robberies and masquerading as the Kid.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson match wits with an opera star intent on blackmailing a king.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Deputy Marshal
programme.desc: A lawman (Jon Hall) tracks bank robbers to Wyoming and gets wind of a railroad-land scam.

programme.desc: Earp rides to the scene of a stagecoach robbery and follows tracks to find a woman, the sole survivor of the attack, in shock; Earp must shoot his way out of a cave when the bandits trap him inside with the woman.

programme.desc: A lawman (Jon Hall) tracks bank robbers to Wyoming and gets wind of a railroad-land scam.

programme.title: Dallas
programme.desc: Soon after the end of the Civil War, Blayde Hollister, a former Confederate officer, is a fugitive from the law. He fakes his own death in order to avoid arrest and to lull his enemies into a false sense of security. It turns out Hollister is gunning for the brothers who murdered his family during the war. Joining up with the newly arrived Marshal Martin Weatherby, Hollister heads for Dallas, where his targets are terrorizing the population with a crime spree.

programme.title: Gunfighters
programme.desc: In Texas, gunfighter Brazos Kane (Randolph Scott) decides to lay down his guns for good and rides out to visit his best friend -- only to witness his murder. When Brazos takes the body to the nearby ranch of the powerful Banner (Griff Barnett), the rancher accuses him of the murder. Brazos leaves Banner's daughter, Bess (Barbara Britton), a vital piece of evidence in the crime, and then must evade Banner and a crooked sheriff as he reluctantly takes up arms to prove his innocence.

programme.title: They Rode West
programme.desc: Dr. Allen Seward (Robert Francis) is the new doctor at a remote Army outpost. His liberal attitudes towards Native Americans become a source of tension between him and his superiors, especially Capt. Peter Blake (Philip Carey), who regards all Native Americans as dangerous and untrustworthy. Seward's insistence on treating several local Kiowa tribespeople for malaria further enrages Blake, who deems Seward a traitor when the Kiowa join forces with the Comanches and attack the fort.

programme.title: Ball of Fire
programme.desc: Hoping to update his chapter on modern slang, encyclopedia writer Professor Bertram Potts (Gary Cooper) ventures into a chic nightclub. Inside, he meets the snarky burlesque performer "Sugarpuss" O'Shea (Barbara Stanwyck). Fascinated by her command of popular jargon, Potts invites her to stay with him. But, unknown to Potts, she is the fiancée of a mobster (Dana Andrews) and wanted by the police. In the ensuing mayhem, Potts must stay on his toes or be swallowed up by bigger fish.

programme.title: Sergeant Rutledge
programme.desc: At a U.S. Army fort in the Arizona Territory in 1881, an officer is murdered, and his beautiful young daughter is beaten, raped and strangled. Army lawyer Tom Cantrell (Jeffrey Hunter) defends the accused, African-American sergeant Braxton Rutledge (Woody Strode), a soldier who had once been under his command. Under questioning by Cantrell and the prosecutor (Carleton Young), multiple witnesses piece together the truth of what happened at the fort that day.

programme.title: Breaker Morant
programme.desc: In South Africa during the Second Boer War, Australian Army Lieutenants Harry "Breaker" Morant (Edward Woodward), Peter Handcock (Bryan Brown) and George Witton (Lewis Fitz-Gerald) stand accused of the murders of six Boer prisoners and the assassination of a German missionary. British Commander-in-Chief Lord Kitchener is determined to see the men found guilty, which he can use as a bargaining chip in an impending peace conference with the Boers.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes links a murder in a quiet English house to a Chicago gangster.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Gay Cavalier
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid (Gilbert Roland) and Pancho (Martin Garralaga) try to help an unhappy bride.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp rides into Santa Fe, N.M., to stop a war between two families vying for control of the land, the Finneys and the Grangers; the local sheriff backs the duplicitous Finneys, who created fake land deeds, but Earp finds the real deeds.

programme.title: They Rode West

His liberal attitudes towards Native Americans become a source of tension between him and his superiors, especially Capt. Peter Blake (Philip Carey), who regards all Native Americans as dangerous and untrustworthy. Seward's insistence on treating several local Kiowa tribespeople for malaria further enrages Blake, who deems Seward a traitor when the Kiowa join forces with the Comanches and attack the fort.

programme.title: Good Day for a Hanging
programme.desc: When the local sheriff is killed after a bank robbery, ex-lawman Ben Cutler (Fred MacMurray) collars the apparent killer, Eddie Campbell (Robert Vaughn). Because of his background as a local youth who spent time living with the Cutlers, Eddie gets the benefit of the doubt from Ben's daughter and his wife-to-be, Ruth (Margaret Hayes). Ben is firm in his belief that Eddie is guilty, and as the matter is debated in a divisive court battle, it will soon become clear whether he's right.

programme.title: The Hasty Heart
programme.desc: On the last day of World War II, Scottish soldier Lachlan MacLachlan is shot in the lower back and needs to be treated at the local medical unit in Burma before he can return home. His stay is lengthened, however, and when his nurse asks why, she learns that his wound is fatal. With the help of an American patient, the staff and other patients at the hospital try to make the Scot's final days happy. But things get ugly when he learns the truth.

programme.title: Wagon Master
programme.desc: When a group of Mormons are run out of town for their religious beliefs, Elder Wiggs searches for a wagon master to guide the outcasts to the San Juan Valley. Happening upon horse traders Travis Blue and Sandy, Wiggs convinces the men to take the position due to their intimate knowledge of the area. Despite Blue and Sandy's guidance, the travelers experience numerous setbacks, especially when the Clegg family outlaws take refuge in their wagon train.

programme.desc: Presentado por el Doctor Senez Rodríguez, el ciclo ofrece herramientas prácticas para ayudar a los espectadores a tener una vida victoriosa con Cristo.

programme.title: La biblia sorprende
programme.desc: Entiende la Biblia sin los dogmas del clero. Las verdaderas enseñanzas de la Biblia de forma simple y amena. Teología sencilla para todos, con sentido del humor.

programme.title: Conexiones Bíblicas
programme.desc: Diferentes temas que tienen que ver con la Biblia y su comprensión y puesta en contexto, el alcance de su mensaje.

programme.title: Salvación en señales y símbolos
programme.desc: El pastor Carlos Muñoz, el doctor Héctor Delgado y su panel explican de forma sencilla el mensaje, los secretos y el lenguaje.

programme.desc: Problemas que aquejan a la salud y cómo evitarlos manteniendo una vida sana y tomando medidas de prevención.

programme.desc: Conversaciones de jóvenes acerca de diferentes temas cristianos que tienen relación con su vida; su reflexión.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: S04 E10 The Ultimate All-Star In the final cattle drive, the three remaining cowboys have one last chance to prove they deserve to be champion; host Trace Adkins and the judges determine the winner of a herd of cattle worth $50,000, a belt buckle and a portable corral.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S04 E28 Day of Reckoning Lucas regrets his attitude toward a reformed outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S04 E29 The Day a Town Slept The new marshal is friends with a known outlaw.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E05 The Great Troop Robbery O'Rourke seeks the help of an Indian detective (Milton Berle) to clear Agarn of theft charges.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E06 The West Goes Ghost O'Rourke and Agarn resign from the Army to become land promoters.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S05 E08 Frank Hamer's First Gunfight Soon after ranch hand Frank Hamer joins the Texas Rangers, he helps them hunt down a mysterious killer, takes part in his first gunfight, and demonstrates a natural gift for detective work that launches a legendary career in law enforcement.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S05 E04 Doc Susie's Oath After frontier physician Doctor Susan Anderson accepts a marriage proposal, she finds herself juggling wedding arrangements and a life-or-death medical case; as her wedding day approaches, Doc Susie is forced to choose between love and medicine.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S03 E08 Robert Rogers: Frontier Soldier Robert Rogers leads a fighting force of rangers behind enemy lines to fight French forces in Colonial America, but one mission tests his men when they must trek 200 miles through the wilderness without food.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E06 The Spirit of Truth After his fur trapping expedition is surprised by a Crow war party, legendary mountain man Jim Bridger suddenly finds himself in a desperate struggle to rescue his fellow trappers when one of them goes missing, and another is on the brink of madness.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E09 The Fossil Feud When bloodthirsty Canadian trappers try to kill him, mountain man Jim Bridger takes cover in an unexplored valley; he runs headlong into a family of escaped slaves who show him the huge footprints and fossilized bones of long-dead monsters.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S03 E19 The White Widow A beautiful widow hires Bart to protect her from an unknown killer.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S04 E13 Home Is the Brave Cheyenne battles a town to learn the reason why a war hero's body is refused burial within the town boundary.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S01 E19 The Gunmen Little Joe and Hoss are mistaken for gunmen while in a small Texas town; they find themselves in the middle of a dangerous feud between two families.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E18 The Visitor Two unhappy heirs threaten a young widow.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E19 The Hero A boy is accused of shooting an outlaw in the back.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E20 The Horsetraders When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E21 The Spoiler An elderly couple moves to North Fork under an assumed name to hide the fact that they are the parents of a vicious killer; the plan backfires when the son shows up at their home.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: S04 E09 The Final Five The five remaining cowboys take wild colts through an obstacle course; they must rope and load as many steers as they can in 30 minutes; host Trace Adkins and the judges eliminate two cowboys.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: S04 E10 The Ultimate All-Star In the final cattle drive, the three remaining cowboys have one last chance to prove they deserve to be champion; host Trace Adkins and the judges determine the winner of a herd of cattle worth $50,000, a belt buckle and a portable corral.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S04 E28 Day of Reckoning Lucas regrets his attitude toward a reformed outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S04 E29 The Day a Town Slept The new marshal is friends with a known outlaw.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E05 The Great Troop Robbery O'Rourke seeks the help of an Indian detective (Milton Berle) to clear Agarn of theft charges.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E06 The West Goes Ghost O'Rourke and Agarn resign from the Army to become land promoters.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S05 E08 Frank Hamer's First Gunfight Soon after ranch hand Frank Hamer joins the Texas Rangers, he helps them hunt down a mysterious killer, takes part in his first gunfight, and demonstrates a natural gift for detective work that launches a legendary career in law enforcement.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S05 E04 Doc Susie's Oath After frontier physician Doctor Susan Anderson accepts a marriage proposal, she finds herself juggling wedding arrangements and a life-or-death medical case; as her wedding day approaches, Doc Susie is forced to choose between love and medicine.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S03 E08 Robert Rogers: Frontier Soldier Robert Rogers leads a fighting force of rangers behind enemy lines to fight French forces in Colonial America, but one mission tests his men when they must trek 200 miles through the wilderness without food.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E06 The Spirit of Truth After his fur trapping expedition is surprised by a Crow war party, legendary mountain man Jim Bridger suddenly finds himself in a desperate struggle to rescue his fellow trappers when one of them goes missing, and another is on the brink of madness.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: S01 E01 The Ultimate Cowboy Twelve cowboys from all over the United States move onto a cattle ranch, where fast friendships are formed and battle lines quickly drawn; Trace Adkins puts the cowboys to the test in a team challenge that will determine who stays and who goes home.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: S01 E02 The Weakest Link The remaining 10 cowboys show off their skills in a timed calf-roping challenge; later, a team challenge reveals that some of the contestants lack the experience needed to compete at this level; one cowboy's antics lead to an angry confrontation.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S04 E30 Milly's Brother A gambler moves into North Fork and begins courting a local girl.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S04 E31 Outlaw Shoes Lucas develops temporary amnesia while visiting a strange town.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E07 Yellow Bird O'Rourke and Agarn ransom an heiress (Julie Newmar) after American Indians kidnap her.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E08 The Ballot of Corporal Agarn Agarn's vote will decide an election, and O'Rourke schemes to make it pay off handsomely.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S05 E02 Heck Thomas Risks It All After his wife leaves him, Deputy Marshal Heck Thomas throws himself into his work, hunting a gang of deadly bootleggers without regard for his own safety; when he falls in love with a kind schoolteacher, Thomas suddenly has a lot more to lose.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S05 E05 Marshal Garfias Faces the Mob As a deputy in Phoenix, Enrique Garfias witnesses the lynching of prisoners by vigilantes; when he is later elected as the town's first marshal, he has a chance at redemption when he attempts to defend a gang of criminals from yet another angry mob.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S03 E02 William Bartram: America's First Great Naturalist Naturalist William Bartram explores the unmapped regions of the South to document the native fauna and flora; after surviving many encounters with Native Americans and wildlife, it's an invisible virus that may finally end the journey and his life.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E03 Fool's Gold Jim Bridger and his fellow trappers believe they are near El Dorado, the mythical Spanish city of gold, when they discover a river filled with gold, but their insatiable greed turns friends into enemies and puts Bridger at risk of a gruesome fate.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E04 A Prince on the Prairie While guiding a hunting expedition, Jim Bridger must deal with an arrogant foreign prince who is abusing his servant boy; the tables soon turn when it's the prince who needs rescuing, and his only hope is the long-suffering servant boy.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S03 E20 Guatemala City Bret tracks a girl to Central America.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S05 E01 The Long Rope Cheyenne is unable to save his friend whose mind has been warped by years of hatred and vengeance.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S01 E20 The Fear Merchants A potential mayoral candidate attempts to stir up trouble between majority and minority groups in town.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead...
programme.desc: ...Reckoning Part 1 Interview Special: Tom Cruise, Hayley Atwell, Simon Pegg and director Christopher McQuarrie talk about the spectacular seventh film in the action-adventure series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead...
programme.desc: ...Reckoning: (2023) Tom Cruise returns as Ethan Hunt and jumps a motorbike off a mountain for real. There's some stuff about an all-powerful AI. But it's the thrills that we're here for!

programme.title: A Quiet Place Part II
programme.desc: (2020) Hushed-horror sequel with Emily Blunt and Cillian Murphy. Armed only with a hearing aid, can the family evade the vicious aliens with super-hearing, and find a community to live in?

programme.title: The Tall Men
programme.desc: (1955) Western. Clark Gable plays a Civil War veteran who, with his brother (Cameron Mitchell), accepts the role of trail boss on a huge cattle drive for a crooked cattleman (Robert Ryan).

programme.title: Forty Guns
programme.desc: (1957) Western. Barbara Stanwyck stars as a cattle rancher who, with her hired guns, rules a town as if it were her own. But then a federal marshal (Barry Sullivan) arrives on the scene.

programme.title: Tora! Tora! Tora!
programme.desc: (1970) Oscar-winning drama portraying the bombing of Pearl Harbor, from both American and Japanese perspectives. With Joseph Cotten and So Yamamura.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: (2023) Seventh instalment in the frenetic sci-fi franchise. The Maximals - part animal, part robot - join the Autobots to battle against planet-munching Unicron and his Terrorcon cronies.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: (2013) All-American action thriller starring Channing Tatum and Jamie Foxx. A Capitol police officer steps up to protect the President when the White House is compromised.

programme.title: Snake Eyes
programme.desc: (2021) Violent martial arts action. A brooding cage fighter (Henry Golding) is contracted to assassinate a target but saves him instead, so that he can infiltrate an ancient ninja society.

programme.title: Broken Arrow

programme.title: Fixed Bayonets!
programme.desc: (1951) Korean War drama about the stress of battle. Officers drop one by one as a US platoon fights a rearguard action, leaving one unwilling man (Richard Basehart) to take their place.

programme.title: Robin and Marian
programme.desc: (1976) Touching romance starring Sean Connery and Audrey Hepburn. The ageing legend Robin Hood returns to Sherwood Forest and discovers that, while he was away, Marian has become an Abbess.

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: (2004) Tense sci-fi thriller starring Dennis Quaid and Jake Gyllenhaal. Can a scientist save his son from a sudden climatic catastrophe?

programme.title: Cocaine Bear
programme.desc: (2023) Darkly comic ursine misadventure about a disparate group of people who happen across a coked-up bear - aka Pablo Eskobear - in the American wilderness. With Keri Russell.

programme.desc: (2024) Alain Guiraudie's psychosexual comedy-drama about a young man who comes home for his old boss's funeral only to move in with the widow, with Félix Kysyl and Catherine Frot.

programme.desc: (2021) Wes Anderson's star-encrusted tribute to the New Yorker magazine covers the final edition of a chaotic fictional publication, following the death of its editor - Bill Murray.

programme.desc: (1954) Western. A strict rancher (Spencer Tracy) treats his sons (Robert Wagner, Richard Widmark, Earl Holliman and Hugh O'Brian) as little more than employees, with fatal consequences.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: (1957) Classic western with Glenn Ford and Van Heflin. The capture of a murderous stagecoach robber propels an impoverished local rancher on a perilous journey. Directed by Delmer Daves.

programme.title: Leave Her to Heaven

programme.title: One Day

programme.title: Commando
programme.desc: (1985) Thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger. To free his kidnapped daughter, an ex US commando must agree to assassinate a South American president. But he's not as pliant as he seems...

programme.title: Predator
programme.desc: (1987) Sci-fi thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger. A US commando unit gets trapped in the jungle by a murderous, seemingly invincible alien hunter. But they ain't got time to bleed.

programme.title: Late Night Shopping

programme.title: Sam's Garage
programme.desc: Former "Shadetree Mechanic" and "Two Guys Garage" host Sam Memmolo, a pioneer in automotive how-to TV, is back turning wrenches and tightening bolts on "Sam's Garage." Memmolo helped develop the concept of step-by-step instructions to help advise viewers of the latest products and techniques for repairing and improving a wide variety of rides, a legacy that continues on his latest series. With vast automotive knowledge in the garage and in the studio, Memmolo is as entertaining as he is experienced. Sam Mahdavi also hosts.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: The M6GT is back, but now she's a running, driving car, and a prototype of the car that is available from Retroformance. Stacey goes through the design, development, and trial and error it takes to bring a new component car to the market.

programme.title: Lost Classics
programme.desc: Tony teams up with the Auto Archeologist, Ryan Brutt, to uncover one of the rarest Dodge Demons in existence. Then Tony follows the trail to make an offer on a movie-star, an Eleanor Mustang. With this deal, the sky's the limit!

programme.title: Off-Road Travel TV
programme.desc: We head to Baja to test a race UTV, then head to Arizona for another incredible off-road adventure. Our crew also tests Sun Lite's 14 THX toy hauler trailer. This is a cool concept that offers so much versatility.

programme.title: Road to Glory
programme.desc: We go behind the scenes and get to know the drivers behind the helmet; from seasoned veterans to young upstarts, each racer has a different path but one goal -- to win the title.

programme.title: Gridlives
programme.desc: Jumping into the deep end of the grid. First-time GLTC driver Kevin Bandy brings his Miata to Carolina Motorsports Park for the GRIDLIFE South Festival. It is an authentic look at the realities of progressing through a high-pressure race weekend, backed by the undeniable support of the GLTC community.

programme.title: Gridlives
programme.desc: The fight to stay on top. 2020 GLTC Champion Eric Kutil throws down at the flagship Midwest Festival at Gingerman Raceway, battling his way toward the podium amidst fierce, door-to-door competition against some of the fastest and best-prepared cars in series history.

programme.title: 2026 FIM World Superbike Championship
programme.desc: The premier production-based motorcycle championship on the planet featuring the fastest 1000cc models piloted by international level riders competing in a 12-round championship across the globe.

programme.title: Gridlives
programme.desc: When the weekend goes sideways. Following Matan Rosenberg, this episode exposes the brutal, behind-the-scenes realities of a race weekend that takes an unexpected turn. It is a testament to the resilience, thrashing, and pure passion that defines the paddock.

programme.title: Racers Unchained
programme.desc: He's an Indy 50 winner, IndyCar champion, and a fan-favorite now working as the team principal of one of the series' most popular teams. Paul Tracy is talking with TK. The two open-wheel racers explore the sport's biggest highs, lows, wins and losses.

programme.title: RACER Weekly
programme.desc: An inside take on the stories, happenings, personalities and cars making the headlines.

programme.title: Launch Control
programme.desc: The team heads to the Oregon Trail Rally, then competes with the Huckster in Gymkhana GRID Pursuit.

programme.desc: Scott Speed attends the 24 hours of Nürburgring.

programme.title: 2026 King of the Hammers
programme.desc: Only the strongest competitors and machines compete in this one-of-a-kind off-road race that requires both speed and survival to finish this true test of man and machine.

programme.title: Lost Classics
programme.desc: Tony digs out a rare Mustang that's been hidden under dusty boxes for decades, but the owner has another surprise in store. Then Tony gets a chance to size up a Model A truck at an auction preview before he heads to the famous Spring Carlisle.

programme.title: My Classic Car
programme.desc: Host Dennis Gage upholds his "honor the timeless classics" catchphrase in this series, as he travels across North America to visit prestigious auto shows and events, spotlighting everything from muscle cars to museum pieces. The handlebar mustachioed Gage takes viewers along for the ride and keeps it entertaining with his unique perspective and enthusiasm for all things automotive.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey rolls in a 1970s Datsun 240Z; he digs into the history of these cars and shows some of the ways to deal with the fragile parts and panels.

programme.title: Sam's Garage
programme.desc: Sam and Doug prepare to start the 2024 Great Race.

programme.title: Creative Drive
programme.desc: Host Taro Koki explores the world of creativity within the automotive industry.

programme.title: 2026 Isle of Man TT
programme.desc: Five classes. Ten races. Thirty-seven miles around one small island. Drivers risk it all at every one of the 200 dangerous turns chasing glory at speeds topping 200MPH in one of the most prestigious and challenging road races in the world.

programme.title: 2026 Madera Racing

programme.title: Vicari Auction Show

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Stacey digs into the unique history of how a WWII vehicle became the first mass-produced, civilian 4x4 truck. Next, he upgrades the electrical and fuel systems on a '49 Power Wagon, so you can drive it safely.

programme.title: Sam's Garage
programme.desc: Former "Shadetree Mechanic" and "Two Guys Garage" host Sam Memmolo, a pioneer in automotive how-to TV, is back turning wrenches and tightening bolts on "Sam's Garage." Memmolo helped develop the concept of step-by-step instructions to help advise viewers of the latest products and techniques for repairing and improving a wide variety of rides, a legacy that continues on his latest series. With vast automotive knowledge in the garage and in the studio, Memmolo is as entertaining as he is experienced. Sam Mahdavi also hosts.

programme.title: Petrolicious - Soul Made
programme.desc: For Rob, it's all about the challenge - trimming the cars other people wouldn't touch.

programme.title: Petrolicious - Soul Made
programme.desc: In a quiet corner of Milan, Pino and Milena La Rosa shape more than cars—they preserve philosophy. Lab Eleven isn't chasing trends; it's refining essence. From accident-free 993s to thoughtful, soulful builds, the focus is purity. No gimmicks, no theater. Just 911s, reborn with intention, balance, and an insistence that perfection lives not in polish—but in purpose.

programme.title: Petrolicious - Soul Made
programme.desc: Through fine art photography rooted in precision and restraint, Thornton reveals the true shape of automotive design. Known for his background in high stakes commercial photography, his work strips away distraction and focuses on light, proportion, and intent.
